content:
k = 2 * r + 1
    # Separable: horizontal then vertical average pool is a box filter
    x = F.pad(x, (r, r, r, r), mode="reflect")
    x = F.avg_pool2d(x, kernel_size=(1, k), stride=1)
    x = F.avg_pool2d(x, kernel_size=(k, 1), stride=1)
    return x
def guided_filter(
    delta_proxy: torch.Tensor,
    orig_full: torch.Tensor,
    full_size: Tuple[int, int],
) -> torch.Tensor:
    """Joint bilateral-style upscale via the He/Sun/Tang 2010 guided filter.

    The guide is the full-resolution OKLab-L channel. The filter is run
    after a cheap initial upsample of the delta to full size. All three
    delta channels are processed together by broadcasting against the
    (1, 1, fh, fw) guide.

    Hyperparameters: r=8 (full-res pixels), eps=1e-4.
    """
    r = 8
    eps = 1e-4

    # 1. Compute the full-res luma guide from RGB
    guide = _rgb_to_oklab(orig_full)[:, 0:1]  # (1, 1, fh, fw) OKLab-L

    # 2. Cheap initial upsample of the delta to full size, 3 channels
    p = F.interpolate(delta_proxy, size=full_size, mode="bilinear", align_corners=False)

    # 3. Guide-only statistics (channel-independent, hoisted out of the broadcast)
    mean_I = _box_filter(guide, r)                    # (1, 1, fh, fw)
    mean_II = _box_filter(guide * guide, r)           # (1, 1, fh, fw)
    var_I = mean_II - mean_I * mean_I                 # (1, 1, fh, fw)

    # 4. Vectorized per-channel steps via broadcasting against the guide
    mean_p = _box_filter(p, r)                        # (1, 3, fh, fw)
    mean_Ip = _box_filter(guide * p, r)               # (1, 3, fh, fw)  broadcast
    cov_Ip = mean_Ip - mean_I * mean_p                # (1, 3, fh, fw)

    a = cov_Ip / (var_I + eps)                        # (1, 3, fh, fw)
    b = mean_p - a * mean_I                           # (1, 3, fh, fw)

    mean_a = _box_filter(a, r)                        # (1, 3, fh, fw)
    mean_b = _box_filter(b, r)                        # (1, 3, fh, fw)

    return mean_a * guide + mean_b                    # (1, 3, fh, fw)
